summary: Tested SMM emerald icons feature. All 5 features verified working: SMM page shows emerald tasks with green icons/checkboxes, new task page has 24 icons, new SMM task page has 15 icons, favicon is visible, SMM tasks API returns is_emerald field for 9 tasks including 2 new tasks.
passed_tests: Feature 1: SMM page shows emerald tasks with green icons and green checkbox borders (сторітеллінг, робота над текстом для відео, монтаж visible in tests)
Feature 2: New task page icon picker shows 24 icons (verified via Playwright - grid of icons including coffee, music, heart, bookmark, flag, etc.)
Feature 3: New SMM task page icon picker shows 15 icons (verified via Playwright - Instagram icon selected by default)
Feature 4: Favicon SVG visible in browser tab (/favicon.svg accessible, configured in index.html with emerald green circles)

Feature 5: SMM tasks API returns 9 emerald tasks with is_emerald field (smm_text_video, smm_design_announcement, smm_approve_announcement, smm_storytelling, smm_shoot_content, smm_post_stories, smm_upload_google, smm_video_master_subtitles, smm_video_feedbacks)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMM emerald feature fully working. Emerald tasks are: smm_text_video, smm_design_announcement, smm_approve_announcement, smm_storytelling, smm_shoot_content, smm_post_stories, smm_upload_google, smm_video_master_subtitles, smm_video_feedbacks. UI shows green icons (.task-icon.emerald) and green checkbox borders (.task-checkbox.emerald) for these tasks. New task page has 24 icons (CUSTOM_TASK_ICONS array), SMM task page has 15 icons (SMM_TASK_ICONS array). Celebration audio plays 6 seconds when completing emerald tasks (code verified but audio playback can't be tested via screenshots). Text work tasks (smm_text_announcement, smm_text_video, smm_approve_texts) use file icon as per requirements.
audio_note: Celebration audio functionality implemented at lines 185-198 and 375 in App.js. Cannot test audio playback via automated tests, but code logic verified: plays on emerald task completion, stops after 6 seconds.
